📋 Required Column Format
NameREQMedicine name
CompanyREQCompany / brand name
CategoryTablet, Syrup, Injection…
Packinge.g. 10T, 100ML
MRPMaximum Retail Price
PTRPrice to Retailer
FormulaComposition / ingredients
Schemee.g. 10+1 Free
StockYes / No (default: Yes)

🔥 Connect Live Sync
Orders & retailers across all devices
3 quick steps on your phone:
1
Open console.firebase.google.com
Tap Create a project → name it anything → Continue
2
Inside the project tap </> Web icon → Register app
You will see a box with firebaseConfig = { … }
Select all that text and Copy it
3
Come back here and Paste it in the box below → Save
Then in Firebase: Build → Firestore Database → Create → Test mode
Paste your Firebase Config here
✅
Firebase Connected!
Live sync is now active.
Orders and retailer requests will appear across
all phones in real time.

Reload the app once to activate.

📵
Mic blocked in WhatsApp
WhatsApp's browser doesn't allow microphone access.
Open the file in Chrome to use voice search.
HOW TO OPEN IN CHROME
1️⃣ Tap ⋮ Menu (top right)
2️⃣ Tap "Open in Chrome"
3️⃣ 🎤 Voice search will work!
